name: Yee's Allure & Beauty
desc: Yee's Allure and Beauty is a fashion brand targeted at a youthful female audience. They wanted their brand design to communicate elegance, sophistication, mystery and power. After our brand strategy session, I had a clear direction on how to bring their vision to life professionally. When we unveiled the brand, they were quite pleased and approved it immediately.
brief: Yee's Allure and Beauty is a fashion brand targeted at a youthful female audience. They wanted their brand design to communicate elegance, sophistication, mystery and power. After our brand strategy session, I had a clear direction on how to bring their vision to life professionally. When we unveiled the brand, they were quite pleased and approved it immediately.

focus: Elegance, sophistication, mystery, power — for a youthful female audience.
